payment_terms.title: Payment Terms

mass_production.note: 30% deposit to start production, balance due before shipping. B/L released after full payment.

payment_terms.payment_protection: We support Alibaba Trade Assurance for secure transactions and buyer protection.

sample_policy.title: Sample Policy

sample_fee.factors: Price varies based on product complexity, customization level, and materials

shipping.method: Customer's DHL/FedEx account (freight collect) or $30-50 freight prepaid

sample_policy.refund_policy: Sample fees are fully refunded or deducted from your first formal order when you place an order over $5,000.

first_order_discount.title: First Order Discount
first_order_discount.note: Discount applies to first-time customers placing orders over $10,000. Cannot be combined with other promotions.

contact_info.title: Contact Information
contact_info.address: Building X, Yuehai Industrial Park, Nanshan District, Shenzhen, China 518000

questions.question: Are you a manufacturer or trading company?
questions.answer: DZAT is a direct manufacturer with our own factory in Shenzhen, China. We specialize in ODM/OEM services for vaping hardware. We welcome factory visits and inspections by appointment. Our facility includes ISO 7 clean rooms, advanced production lines, and comprehensive quality testing laboratories.

questions.question: Can you customize flavors?
questions.answer: As a hardware manufacturer, DZAT focuses on device production and does not produce e-liquid or flavors. However, we can recommend reliable flavor suppliers we've worked with, or you can use your own flavor suppliers. We can also provide empty devices that are compatible with various e-liquid formulations.

questions.question: What makes your products different from others?
questions.answer: DZAT's key differentiators include: 1) Premium coil technology (mesh/ceramic/cotton options) for superior flavor and longevity; 2) Strict quality control with 100% product inspection and ISO 7 clean room production; 3) Fast customization with 25-35 day lead times; 4) Full compliance support including FDA, CE, and ISO certifications; 5) Comprehensive after-sales support and warranty coverage.

questions.question: Do you provide packaging design?
questions.answer: Yes, DZAT provides full OEM services including packaging design. Our in-house design team can create custom packaging based on your brand guidelines, target market requirements, and regulatory compliance needs. We can also work with your existing design files. Our packaging services include box design, insert cards, user manuals, and compliance labeling.

questions.question: What is your warranty policy?
questions.answer: DZAT provides comprehensive warranty coverage: 1) Product warranty against manufacturing defects with free replacement for defective units; 2) After-sales technical support with dedicated support team; 3) Free replacement for confirmed defective products within warranty period; 4) Continuous product improvement based on customer feedback. Specific warranty terms vary by product type and will be detailed in the sales contract. We also offer extended warranty options for bulk orders.

questions.question: How do I start working with DZAT?
questions.answer: Getting started with DZAT is easy: 1) Initial Contact - Reach out via email (sales@dzat.com) or WhatsApp with your company information and product interests; 2) Consultation - Our sales team will discuss your requirements, provide product recommendations, and answer your questions; 3) Sample Request - Order samples to evaluate our quality (sample fees apply, refundable on bulk orders); 4) Quotation - Receive detailed quotation based on your specifications and quantity; 5) Contract & Production - Sign contract, pay deposit, and we begin production; 6) Delivery - Quality inspection, final payment, and shipment. We guide you through every step of the process.

questions.question: Can I visit your factory?
questions.answer: Absolutely! DZAT welcomes factory visits and inspections. We believe transparency builds trust, and we are proud to show our manufacturing capabilities. To arrange a visit: 1) Contact us at least 1-2 weeks in advance to schedule; 2) Provide your company details and preferred dates; 3) We will prepare an agenda including factory tour, production line observation, quality lab visit, and meeting with our team; 4) We can also assist with local transportation and accommodation recommendations. Factory visits help you understand our capabilities, quality control processes, and build a stronger business relationship. We look forward to hosting you in Shenzhen!
